summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, closure recommendations, or fix PR artifacts are planned. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, so each listed PR is classified independently; one security-sensitive linked PR is quarantined separately.

actions.reason: Keep as an independent open PR lane; it needs normal review/author follow-up rather than inventory closeout.
Keep as its own open PR lane; no duplicate/superseded close is justified in this inventory shard.
Keep as an independent focused PR awaiting proof/review; it is not a low-signal or duplicate close candidate.
Keep as independent UI behavior work; related closed context does not make it duplicate or superseded.
Keep as its own live Matrix fix lane; no closure or merge action is available in plan mode for this shard.
Keep as an independent CI PR with maintainer-requested rebase/update; not a boring duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Keep as an independent feature PR needing proof and review fixes; do not close as low-signal because it contains substantive scoped implementation.
Keep as an independent bugfix PR with clear blockers; no closeout or replacement fix path is allowed by this job.
Keep as an independent small WhatsApp cleanup PR; it is related to watchdog work but not the same scope as config exposure.
Keep as an independent memory-lancedb compatibility PR; it is not duplicate of the earlier landed dimensions pass-through fix.
Security-sensitive linked context is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be routed without affecting unrelated PR classifications.
